exemplar.title: Develop personalised workout plans that adapt to individual fitness levels, goals, and preferences, integrating a variety of exercises to promote overall well-being.

detailedExemplarData.title: Develop personalised workout plans that adapt to individual fitness levels, goals, and preferences, integrating a variety of exercises to promote overall well-being.

strengths: Identification of key ATL skills such as communication, creative thinking and media literacy.
Use of a mind map as an ideation tool to organize concepts and explore connections.
Inclusion of social media screenshots and other artifacts as evidence of research.
Evidence figures provided to support claims of skill application.
Clear acknowledgement of using external feedback (coach, peers) to inform design choices.
weaknesses: ATL skills are described in general terms; links to specific product outcomes are not clearly drawn.
Instances of critical evaluation (e.g., online source vetting) lack detailed examples of how they improved the workout plan.
Mindâmap branches are not explicitly tied to implemented website features or design decisions.
Social media screenshots are presented without annotation showing how each influenced a particular aspect of the product.
Captions for supporting figures do not explicitly reference the ATL skills being demonstrated or their impact on quality.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: You demonstrate awareness of important ATL skills and collect a variety of evidenceâmind maps, media artifacts and coach feedbackâto show your process. To deepen this section, connect each skill directly to concrete changes in your product, and provide detailed instances of how critical evaluation or creative thinking led to specific design improvements. Annotating your evidence to highlight the skillâtoâoutcome relationship will strengthen the narrative of skill application.

strengths: Clear articulation of personal interest in fitness, demonstrating genuine motivation.
A wellâdefined learning goal that aligns with the intended product.
Specification statements that capture key aspects of the workout planner concept.
A concise shortâterm planning table mapping tasks and responsibilities.
Clear description of the product idea, showing understanding of the project scope.
Recognition of prior experience and relevant competencies to support project feasibility.
weaknesses: Success criteria lack measurable targets (for example, specific completion rates or performance metrics).
Connections between past fitness experiences and design decisions are described generally rather than with concrete examples.
Project plan does not specify deadlines, required resources or accountability measures to ensure feasibility.
Technical requirements (platform, tools, hosting) and necessary skills are not detailed, limiting clarity on implementation.
Several cells in the specification outcomes table remain incomplete, leaving some success descriptors undefined.
The âRelevant Success Criteria?â column uses a binary label without naming the specific criteria.
Labeling a single approach as âMethod #1â implies missing alternatives and reduces clarity.
Learning goal would benefit from multiple, detailed success criteria to define milestones clearly.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your planning section shows strong engagement and clarity of purpose, with a motivating personal interest, a coherent learning goal and a wellâarticulated product concept. You map out tasks effectively and draw on prior experience. To elevate this further, you should refine success criteria to be specific and measurable, flesh out the project timeline with deadlines and resources, complete all specification tables, and detail the technical roadmap. These adjustments will transform a solid plan into a fully actionable and verifiable strategy.

strengths: Insightful reflection on personal growth, acknowledging new competencies gained.
An evaluation table that organizes data and observations in a coherent format.
Thoughtful discussion of the projectâs impact on others, indicating awareness of audience response.
Clear articulation of how skills developed will influence future endeavors.
Selfâevaluation that highlights the projectâs key strengths and achievements.
Comprehensive list of personal impact, showing consideration of multiple traits and outcomes.
weaknesses: Reflection does not explicitly link each piece of evidence back to the original success criteria.
Evaluation table entries are not aligned oneâtoâone with success criteria and supporting evidence.
Claims about impact on others lack actual user feedback or testimonials to substantiate them.
Future action steps are general rather than specifying how new skills will be applied in upcoming projects.
No concrete plan is outlined for addressing identified weaknesses in future iterations.
Personal impact list would benefit from detailing how specific project challenges fostered particular traits.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your reflective section demonstrates maturity, with a wellâstructured evaluation and thoughtful consideration of both self and audience impact. To enhance this further, align each reflection point directly with your success criteria and back it up with specific quantitative or qualitative evidence, including real user feedback where possible. Outlining clear next steps to address weaknesses and describing exactly how you will apply your new skills in future projects will complete a robust reflective cycle.

annotations.comment: Your reflection on personal growth is insightful; deepen by evaluating how specific evidence demonstrates meeting each learning success criterion you set out.
You describe your personal interest effectively; strengthen by giving specific examples of how past fitness experiences directly informed design choices in your workout plans.
You describe communication and creativeâthinking skills clearly; strengthen by linking these skills to specific product outcomes (e.g., how coach feedback altered a workout component).
Your evaluation table provides useful data; refine by aligning each success criterion with specific quantitative or qualitative evidence for a clearer, criterion-based judgment.
Your specification statements are clear, but refine the success criteria to include measurable targets (e.g., â95% of users complete workouts for all five sports without errorâ).

Your learning goal is clear and relevant, but consider adding multiple measurable success criteria (e.g., specific metrics or milestones) to define what success looks like for each aspect of your goal.
Your project plan lists key steps, but would benefit from specifying deadlines, required resources and accountability measures to demonstrate feasibility and clear sequencing.
You outline use of media literacy well; deepen by illustrating a precise instance where critical evaluation of an online source led to a notable improvement in your workout plan design.
Your mind map is an effective ideation tool; strengthen by tying each branch back to concrete features implemented in your website to demonstrate impact.
Good inclusion of social media evidence; enhance by annotating how each video screenshot directly influenced a specific element of your product design.
Your reflection on impact to others is thoughtful; consider including actual user feedback or testimonials to substantiate your claims of influence.
You articulate future personal impact well; strengthen by specifying how you will apply these newly developed skills to upcoming projects or goals.
Your self-evaluation highlights key strengths; expand by outlining a concrete plan to address identified weaknesses (e.g., increasing sports coverage in future iterations).
Your product idea is articulated clearly, but enhance feasibility by specifying technical requirements (platform, tools, hosting) and necessary skills.
Your short-term planning table effectively maps tasks; refine the âRelevant Success Criteria?â column by naming specific criteria descriptions rather than a binary âYes/No.â
Good mention of prior experience; enrich by listing specific competencies (e.g., HTML, CSS, CMS) to clarify resource readiness for website development.
Your personal impact list is comprehensive; strengthen by reflecting on how at least two traits were specifically developed through concrete project challenges.
Several cells in your specification outcomes table appear unfinished (e.g., under âSports includedâ); ensure all descriptors are complete to define success levels clearly.
Labeling as âMethod #1â suggests more methods follow; either include a second method or remove the numbering to maintain clarity.
Your evidence figures for Bii support your descriptions; align captions to explicitly reference how each example demonstrates application of the named ATL skill in product creation.
